---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement
title: "feat: <short description>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What user problem is this solving? Who feels the pain today and how often?

## Proposed solution

Describe the change you would like to see. Sketch the API, UI, or data
model where relevant.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you considered and why you ruled them out.

## Additional context

Mockups, links to the SRD, related tickets, or anything else that helps
maintainers scope the work.
